2026.05.25.1.title: Now installable as an app!
highlights: The Tracker is now installable as a mobile app on Android (home screen) and as a desktop app on Windows/Mac
Faster loading and works offline for the app shell — your form drafts still save automatically when you're offline
New version notifications: you'll be prompted to update whenever a new version is published
Version information is now visible in the footer — tap the version number to see update status

2026.05.04.1.title: Previous version
highlights: Earlier release before app store packaging — see deployment notes for details.
